_comment: Probe 2B fallback — command-type hooks that bypass $COHERENCE_PORT env propagation entirely. Each hook invokes the agent-coherence-hook-client console script which reads <workspace>/.coherence/server.pid for the port and hook.secret for the Bearer token, then makes the HTTP POST. Use only if Phase E.0 probe 2A demonstrates $CLAUDE_ENV_FILE propagation is unreliable on the target claude version. See docs/probes/2026-05-17-phase-e0-probe-procedure.md.
